title: Teens accused of attack on officer to appear in regional court
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The four teenagers accused of attempting to kill a Da Gamaskop police officer on 25 May appeared in the Mossel Bay Magistrate’s Court on Tuesday 23 September.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The four teenagers accused of attempting to kill a Da Gamaskop police officer on 25 May appeared in the Mossel Bay Magistrate’s Court on Tuesday 23 September."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The police officer, who had been off duty at the time of the attack, had been walking with a friend down Dalindyebo Street in Albert Luthuli Park, Mossel Bay, when a group of people wielding an axe and other sharp objects attacked him."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The friend was unharmed.","html":"The friend was unharmed."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The officer was rushed to hospital with life-threatening injuries. Four teenagers aged between 16 and 19 were arrested within 24 hours of the attack and charged with the attempted murder of the officer.","html":"The officer was rushed to hospital with life-threatening injuries. Four teenagers aged between 16 and 19 were arrested within 24 hours of the attack and charged with the attempted murder of the officer."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"They were released on bail of R500 each on 13 June. They are expected to make their first appearance in the Mossel Bay Regional Court on 20 November.","html":"They were released on bail of R500 each on 13 June. They are expected to make their first appearance in the Mossel Bay Regional Court on 20 November."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Previous articles:","html":"Previous articles:"},{"type":"list","items":["Bail application finalised for four teens accused of attacking police officer","Axe attack on officer: Bail application postponed","Axe attack on police officer: Praise after quick arrests","Four teenagers arrested for axe attack on constable in Mossel Bay"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Teens accused of attack on officer to appear in regional court
